courses.description: Master the core concepts of Angular including routing, reactive forms, components, dependency injection, and state management in this complete modern course.
Learn to design, scale, and build resilient Backend microservice architectures using NestJS, RabbitMQ, gRPC, and Redis.
Build cohesive, scalable design systems in Figma and learn how to translate them to UI frameworks smoothly.
Write clean React components using clean code principles. Master Vitest, React Testing Library, and Playwright.
A beginner-friendly guide to containerizing your web applications and deploying them to local and cloud Kubernetes clusters.
